creator: maxsteciuk@gmail.com
text:
Hi

The issue  has become reproducible lately again when attempting to start up www/chromium. This has happened on latest TrueOS/Trident build which is based on FreeBSD-13.0-CURRENT as per below


Can the bug please be re-opened so that it does not look abandoned?


{code}
[~]$ chrome
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0: Undefined symbol "environ"
[~]$ uname -a
FreeBSD trident-den 13.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT GENERIC-NODEBUG  amd64
{code}


Thanks,
Max
